title: Cozy Norwegian Cheese Fritters
description: A warm and comforting Norwegian-inspired dish featuring crispy fritters filled with melted cheese and a hint of coziness.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, milk, and a pinch of salt.
Add the shredded cheese and mix until well combined.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the cheese mixture into the skillet.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Serve the fritters hot with a dollop of cream on top.
